meta.title: Philippine Carrier Baggage Rules
meta.disclaimer: Fees and allowances change frequently and vary by fare type, route, and promo period. Verify against each carrier's official page before displaying to end users, and refresh this file periodically.
meta.note_on_2go_source: An older 2017 2GO tariff (75kg free, PHP 10-15/kg) circulates online and is OUTDATED. Figures below reflect 2GO's current official site (50kg free, PHP 30/kg general excess).

carry_on.description: 1 hand-carry item (overhead bin) + 1 personal item (under seat)
carry_on.note: Overweight hand-carry may be forced into checked baggage at standard checked rates; no separate carry-on excess fee.

prepaid_online.international_notes: Higher than domestic; varies by destination

checked_baggage.purchase_deadline: Manage Booking online up to 2 hours before departure; cheapest when bought at initial booking
checked_baggage.rate_change_note: Baggage rates increased effective 2026-02-19; domestic airport rates increased further 2026-05-15

carry_on.description: 1 cabin bag + 1 small personal item (laptop bag/handbag)

checked_baggage.bags_per_purchase: 1 checked baggage allowance per guest per flight; no limit on number of physical bags as long as total weight stays within purchased allowance
checked_baggage.prepaid_online_20kg_php: 507 (best case, early booking) up to 780-1100 (domestic, later booking)
purchase_channels: Ask Bo chatbot up to 2 hours before departure
Airport counter (most expensive, applicable airport rates)
checked_baggage.sports_equipment: Accepted as checked baggage within weight guidelines (bicycles, surfboards, golf, skis, diving gear, etc.)

carry_on.description: 1 carry-on bag + 1 personal item, all classes

checked_baggage.system: Hybrid: Weight Concept (domestic & most Asia routes) and Piece Concept (North America, Guam, Canada)

weight_concept.applies_to: Domestic and most Asian international routes
weight_concept.typical_allowance_kg: 0-30 depending on fare family (e.g. Economy Supersaver often 0kg)
weight_concept.excess_rate_note: Rate has risen over time (PHP 350/kg in 2024 to PHP 400/kg in 2026); always confirm current rate

piece_concept.applies_to: USA, Canada, Guam and other Area 2/3 long-haul routes

prepaid_baggage.channel: myPAL Baggage Plus portal, up to 4 hours before departure
prepaid_baggage.note: Significantly cheaper than paying excess at the airport; rates per sector, updated effective 2026-02-26

checked_baggage.mabuhay_miles_redemption: Elite/Premier Elite members get extra 10-30kg (or 1 extra piece) free; Million Miler gets extra 40kg (or 2 pieces) free. Miles can also be redeemed to pay for excess (e.g. ~1900 miles per 10kg domestic)

checked_baggage.free_allowance_basis: Per full paying passenger; hand-carried/personal items only
checked_baggage.infant_note: Infants who paid Child Rate get the 50kg free allowance; infants who did not are not entitled to free baggage
excess_conditions: Baggage exceeding 20in height x 30in width (obstructs passageways / won't fit passenger accommodation)
Baggage in commercial quantity or bulk packaging beyond normal personal use
Note: boxes/cargo shipments are generally billed as cargo, separate from the passenger's personal 50kg allowance
checked_baggage.source_note: Rates as published on 2go.com.ph as of 2026; supersedes an outdated 2017 tariff sheet (75kg free, PHP 10-15/kg) still found on some third-party sites

checked_baggage.free_allowance_basis: Per paying passenger, generally ages 12 and up (children 11 and below typically excluded per official guidelines)
checked_baggage.commercial_goods_note: May be subject to additional fees beyond the standard per-kg excess rate
checked_baggage.requirements: All baggage must be properly tagged and secured
